privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the initial gym 'Downtown Fitness Hub' is synthetically generated via Django ORM in setup_task.sh. The expected new attributes for the gym (name 'Iron Peak Athletics', phone '+1-555-842-9631', street '742 Evergreen Terrace', city 'Springfield', and zip '62704') exactly match the task description instructions and are enforced programmatically in verifier.py.
